subject: How many PTO days can I carry over?
body: Hi, I have 8 unused vacation days this year. Can I carry them all into next year, or do I lose some? Thanks!

subject: Expense claim from 3 months ago
body: I just found a hotel receipt from a client trip in March that I never submitted. It's about $400. Can I still claim it?

subject: Uncomfortable situation with my team lead
body: I don't really know how to write this. My team lead keeps making comments about my appearance in front of the team and it's making me dread coming to work. I don't want to get anyone in trouble but I need it to stop.

subject: Working from Portugal for a month
body: My partner has a work placement in Lisbon this autumn. Could I work remotely from Portugal for about 4-5 weeks? What's the process?

subject: Back injury - need to change my desk setup
body: I herniated a disc a few weeks ago and my physio says I need a standing desk and can't commute daily for a while. What are my options for a medical accommodation?

subject: Adding my new baby to health insurance
body: Our daughter was born two weeks ago! How do I add her to my health plan, and is there a deadline?

subject: Am I about to be fired?
body: My manager put me on a PIP last month and now I've been removed from two projects without explanation. Nobody is telling me anything. Am I being managed out? What are my rights here?

subject: Gym membership reimbursement
body: Does the company cover gym memberships? Mine is $45/month. If yes, how do I claim it?

subject: Parental leave for adoption
body: We're adopting a child early next year and I'll be the primary caregiver. How much leave am I entitled to and when do I need to tell you by?

subject: Question about my equity refresh and also PTO
body: Two things: 1) I was told at my review I'd get an equity refresh but I haven't seen paperwork - who do I chase? 2) Also how much notice do I need to give for a 2-week vacation?
